title: AG09Z to AG10A Governed Object Pipeline Planning Handoff
ag10a_purpose: Create a governed, cost-aware object pipeline for non-text article assets and site-wide visual integrity.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Explain article logic, policy flow, concept architecture or reader lens visually.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Controlled insertion only after article-shape, wrap and mobile-width checks.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Represent quantitative data only where validated data source exists.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Centrally aligned in reading column; no mobile overflow.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Show structured comparison, timeline, references or datasets.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Responsive table wrapper required; central alignment for vertical reading flow.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Show systems, stages, frameworks or causal relationships.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Controlled width; caption and attribution mandatory.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Use only where location-based explanation adds value.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Source/rights and mobile behavior must be approved first.

ag10a_scope_candidates.purpose: Detect older pages where image placeholders or missing visuals appear.
ag10a_scope_candidates.placement_rule: Site-wide audit first; correction plan later.

cost_control_doctrine: Do not use external image generation unless internal SVG/template solution is insufficient.
Separate object candidate planning from object generation.
Generate or insert only after approval and source/rights/attribution checks.
Do not re-run full article pipeline merely to add objects.
